message:
test(fcp-core): update enrollment and simulate request test vectors

Updates the CBOR-encoded golden test vectors for protocol testing:

- enrollment/request_vectors.cbor: Updated device enrollment test cases
  covering basic enrollment and metadata-enriched enrollment scenarios
- simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor: Updated simulate request cases
  covering cost estimation, availability checking, and full-option requests

These vectors are used by property-based tests to verify that request
serialization/deserialization remains stable across protocol changes.
Minor adjustments to align with current message schema expectations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
